steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank is the main verb position in the second independent clause: they [blank] valuable items. The first clause establishes past tense: merchants exported...

steps.title: Apply the finite verb rule
steps.content: An independent clause requires a finite verb as its main verb. Choice B, obtained, is simple past tense, which is finite and matches the tense of exported. Choices A, C, and D are non-finite forms—infinitive, participle, and perfect participle—which cannot serve as main verbs. That matches choice B — B is correct.
